description.en: Product boundary, audience, and current state for cast-a-doc.
description.zh-CN: cast-a-doc 的产品边界、用户和当前状态。

body.en: Turn structured document JSON into portable, self-contained HTML artifacts.
body.zh-CN: 把结构化文档 JSON 转成可携带、自包含的 HTML 产物。

body.en: Give coding agents a stable contract for producing engineering documents with predictable layout and validation.
body.zh-CN: 给 coding agent 一份稳定契约，用于生成布局和校验都可预期的工程文档。

text.en: cast-a-doc is the rendering and document-contract skill in CAST Docs. It should stay focused on JSON shape, reusable document components, local validation, and generated HTML. cast-a-start should own repository onboarding, rewrite strategy, and project planning decisions.
text.zh-CN: cast-a-doc 是 CAST Docs 中负责渲染与文档契约的 skill。它应聚焦 JSON 形态、可复用文档组件、本地校验和 HTML 生成。cast-a-start 应负责仓库启动、重写策略和项目规划决策。

rows.en: A compact source format and renderer that can be used without extra packages.
rows.zh-CN: 无需额外依赖即可使用的紧凑源格式和渲染器。

rows.en: JSON validates and HTML renders deterministically.
rows.zh-CN: JSON 可校验，HTML 可确定性渲染。

rows.en: Stable examples, fixtures, and tests when changing the renderer.
rows.zh-CN: 修改渲染器时有稳定示例、fixture 和测试。
fixture 检查能捕捉行为漂移。

rows.en: A readable artifact that works from a browser, email attachment, archive, or Pages site.
rows.zh-CN: 能在浏览器、邮件附件、归档或 Pages 站点中阅读的产物。

rows.en: No local setup is needed to view the document.
rows.zh-CN: 查看文档不需要本地配置。

items.en: The renderer is implemented in Python and uses only the standard library.
items.zh-CN: 渲染器由 Python 实现，并且只使用标准库。

items.en: The schema controls metadata, manifest, sections, localized text, and reusable blocks.
items.zh-CN: schema 控制 metadata、manifest、sections、多语言文本和可复用 block。

items.en: Examples and generated HTML pages double as fixture coverage and public documentation.
items.zh-CN: 示例与生成 HTML 同时承担 fixture 覆盖和公开文档角色。

items.en: The project profile under .cast-docs records repository-level defaults for output paths, writing style, templates, assets, and standardized style profiles.
items.zh-CN: .cast-docs 下的 project profile 记录输出路径、写作风格、模板、资源和标准化样式配置等仓库级默认值。

body.en: cast-a-doc should not become a web app, a markdown dialect, a live collaboration platform, or a hidden agent memory system.
body.zh-CN: cast-a-doc 不应变成 Web 应用、Markdown 方言、实时协作平台或隐藏 agent 记忆系统。

items.en: Do not require external CDNs or runtime JavaScript frameworks.
items.zh-CN: 不要求外部 CDN 或运行时 JavaScript 框架。

items.en: Do not silently overwrite repository documents during a rewrite.
items.zh-CN: 重写时不静默覆盖仓库文档。

items.en: Do not move project planning responsibility out of cast-a-start.
items.zh-CN: 不把项目规划职责从 cast-a-start 挪走。
